title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
